title: Aluminium Extendable Curtain Rod Tension Pole Easy Fitting For Net Curtains Shower Curtains or Voile, Length 55-90cm, Diameter 1.3cm,Black
features: Versatile Usage: used as a curtain rod for narrow windows, sidelight windows, shower enclosures or bathtubs. And can be used to divide narrow spaces, like wardrobe, closet, bookshelf, drawer, cabinet and under sink area, space saving and organizing. It can even be used to collect and organize kitchen utensils.
Metal rod with baked white paint material surface. Both ends of the skid resistant plastic, increase the friction with the wall of the pole, more firm, not easy to fall off.
Built-in strong spring construction allows each pole bear about 1-2kg. (Note: the friction of the wall and the extension of the rod will affect the use.)
Tension rod adjusts from 55cm to 90cm with outer tube diameter of 1.3cm
No tools or fixings required; no screws, glue or holes; no damage to walls, doors, windows or cupboard.. Only need to adjust the length to stuck between the walls.
description: Product Description Removable Anti-slip Endcap Thicken Built in Spring High Quality Material Freely Adjustable
